'''Padra''' was a homeless [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was picked up by [[Garris Shrike]]. He was one of many street children Shrike used to beg and steal for him as he traveled from world to world in the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']] on smuggling runs. Padra grew up begging, but was eventually "promoted" by the droid [[F8GN]] to pickpocketing. Padra felt this was much more respectable than what he called "baby begging."

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}}
